scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --tsconfig tsconfig.json --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --clean --external react --external react-native --external expo --external react-native-svg --external @cdx-extensions/di-sdk
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --tsconfig tsconfig.json --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --watch --external react --external react-native --external expo --external react-native-svg --external @cdx-extensions/di-sdk
